# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🎨 UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML**: Used appropriate elements (button, nav, section, etc.)
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav**: All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Icon-only buttons and complex components have descriptive ARIA labels
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Text and UI elements meet WCAG AA contrast standards
- [ ] **Focus States**: Clear visual indicators for focused elements
- [ ] **Responsiveness**: UI works well on different screen sizes

## Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
